name: Tarte Alsacienne
recipeIngredient: Green apples, thinly sliced and peeled (1 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, cream cheese, and vanilla in a mixer or processor.
2. Reduce speed to low and add flour. Mix until incorporated.
3. Remove dough from the mixer and form into 3 balls. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour before using. Dough can be frozen for up to 2 months.
4. Pound each chilled ball of dough on lightly floured wax paper with a rolling pin until flattened.
5. Roll out dough into an 11-inch circle, lift onto a 9-inch glass pie dish, and press firmly into the dish. Remove and discard wax paper.
6. Preheat oven to 400°F.
7. Arrange apples in the pie crust.
8. In a bowl, beat eggs, half-and-half, sugar, vanilla, and mace.
9. Pour the mixture over the apples.
10. Place the pie in the oven and bake until the mixture is set, about 30 minutes.
